pi_items.source: Web search confirmed C&W Construction is a pre-configured business partner in iDempiere GardenWorld demo data
Task description line 5 specifies Subject: 'Oak Street Office Park'. Export script queries C_Opportunity.Name field for this exact value.
Task description line 5 explicitly states 'Expected Amount: 120,000 USD'. iDempiere Sales Opportunity window has Opportunity Amount field (numeric type).
Task description line 5 explicitly states 'Probability: 40%'. iDempiere Sales Opportunity window has Probability field (numeric type representing percentage).

Task description line 5 specifies Description: 'Customer bidding on office park project. Requires 50 large oak trees.' which includes the keyword. Verifier checks for 'oak trees' in description (line 113).
Task description line 5 states 'Expected Close Date: Set this to exactly 3 months from today'. Verifier calculates target date as task_date + 90 days (line 97).

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a Sales Opportunity in iDempiere CRM for the existing customer C&W Construction (verified as a real GardenWorld demo partner) with the subject 'Oak Street Office Park', expected amount of $120,000 USD, probability of 40%, an expected close date 3 months from task start, and a description containing 'oak trees'. All metadata values are consistent with task requirements and appropriate for iDempiere's Sales Opportunity window fields (Business Partner, Name, Opportunity Amount, Probability, Expected Close Date, Description). The data is synthetic - defined by the task specification rather than sourced from external datasets.
